failure_reason: Added a bounded optimizer-state delta slice receipt. The new floor requires a valid optimizer cell ref, before/after state ids, positive step, nonzero integer delta, valid chunk-range policy row, provenance, and substrate-cell authority while leaving optimizer-step math, live mesh transport, payload merkle proof, durable query, privacy, and conflict policy explicit as next walls.
